name: Marcus
comment: Lost the weight, fixed my skin, finally got a real haircut. 8 months and I'm a different person — girls actually text first now.

name: Andre
comment: Dropped 12kg, grew the beard out properly and got a clean lineup. The confidence boost is unreal.

name: Kevin
comment: Skin cleared up, ditched the glasses for contacts, fixed the hair. People at work treat me completely differently.

name: Mateo
comment: Lost 20kg and the jawline was hiding under there the whole time. Wish I'd started years ago.

name: Rohan
comment: Fixed my skin and brows first, then the hair and beard. I don't even recognise my old photos.
